title: Instant Picking
description: Instantly collect everything around you with a configurable range.
body:
# Instant Picking

![Instant Picking](https://i.imgur.com/wD4fcxA.gif)

Just hit caps lock and everything around you will be instantly picked up, with a radius of 5 blocks (by default).

⚠Take note:

- You won't pick anything if you have a full inventory.
- When you activate Instant Picking you can no longer drop items, you'll need to toggle off first.

In the configs you can:

Set if this is set by default, by entering the world.

Set the item picking radius.

Set if you want a chat notification whenever you toggle the mechanic.
